name: ANTEC NX200M RGB, Large Mesh Front Panel, USB3.0 Ready, 3 x 120mm RGB Fixed Mode Fans Included, TG Swing Side Panel, Up to 5 Fans Simultaneously, 240mm Radiator Support, Mini-Tower M-ATX Gaming Case
